CONTACT

Contact

Contact Parts-Mall Africa for head office support, wholesale conversations, campaign enquiries, or help getting to the right branch.

Head office details

Meadowdale is the main contact point for head office enquiries, commercial discussions, marketing campaigns, and support that needs to be routed beyond a single branch.

Email: pma.sales1@parts-mall
